selections.name: Mr Tadashi
selections.reason: On a three-run winning streak, all on rain-affected tracks. Excels in heavy conditions and is very tough to beat at this circuit.

selections.name: County Kilkenny (IRE)
selections.reason: Consistent form in similar grades and possesses a strong wet-track record. Apprentice claim brings the weight down nicely.

selections.name: Philadelphia Storm
selections.reason: Ready to peak after four runs back. Boasts excellent heavy track stats and Brodie Loy takes the ride.

selections.name: Miss Stalwart (NZ)
selections.reason: Well-placed here and capable of much better. Has won on heavy ground previously.

danger_horse.name: County Kilkenny (IRE)
danger_horse.reason: Strong wet-track performer who will appreciate the distance and the claim.

selections.name: Rockabye Roxy
selections.reason: Extremely consistent with three consecutive runner-up finishes. Handles wet tracks well and rates as the one to beat.

selections.name: Seguro
selections.reason: Solid third behind Rockabye Roxy last start on a heavy track. Looks a strong top-three prospect again.

selections.name: Broken Image
selections.reason: Raced well for fourth on heavy ground last start. Blaike Mcdougall takes the ride from a good draw.

selections.name: Star Royal
selections.reason: Second-up after a six-month break. Expected to improve significantly with that run under her belt.

danger_horse.name: Seguro
danger_horse.reason: Finished close to the top pick last start and can pose a threat if he finds further improvement.

selections.name: Hold This
selections.reason: Excellent second last start on heavy ground. Strips fitter second-up and Blaike Mcdougall rides for a top stable.

selections.name: Distant Stripes
selections.reason: Incredibly consistent on heavy tracks with three consecutive thirds. Sure to be in the finish again.

selections.name: Our Dandi Angel
selections.reason: Solid debut third at Goulburn on a slow track. Looms as a serious progressive contender.

selections.name: Kip Star
selections.reason: Two solid thirds on the Canberra Acton synthetic. Hard to beat if he can translate that form to turf.

danger_horse.name: Distant Stripes
danger_horse.reason: A model of consistency on wet tracks who never runs a bad race under these conditions.

selections.name: Teresprit
selections.reason: Gained a start as an emergency. Won well on heavy ground last start at Gundagai and is beautifully drawn.

selections.name: Taluk
selections.reason: Very consistent wet-tracker with consecutive thirds on heavy tracks at Wagga. Blaike Mcdougall rides.

selections.name: Liquor Talk
selections.reason: First-up specialist who has won fresh previously. Boasts a strong heavy track record (5: 2-0-0).

selections.name: Iconic Rose
selections.reason: Ran on strongly for third last start on heavy ground at Wagga. Further improvement expected.

danger_horse.name: Taluk
danger_horse.reason: Extremely reliable in wet conditions and rarely misses the placings at this track.

selections.name: Hot Toddy
selections.reason: Impressive last-start winner on heavy ground at Wagga. Fitter now and rates as the clear top pick.

selections.name: Theo's Choice
selections.reason: Very consistent performer who handles heavy tracks well. Brodie Loy takes the ride from a suitable draw.

selections.name: Jenni Divine
selections.reason: Solid third last start on a slow track. Handles wet conditions and should be prominent throughout.

selections.name: Under Wraps
selections.reason: Won his maiden on heavy ground at Wagga three starts back. Blaike Mcdougall rides and can bounce back.

danger_horse.name: Theo's Choice
danger_horse.reason: Consistent wet-tracker who will be hitting the line strongly under Brodie Loy.

selections.name: Presides
selections.reason: Won a Bm64 on heavy ground at Kembla two starts back. Boasts an excellent heavy track record (5: 2-2-1).

selections.name: Mathrin
selections.reason: Extremely experienced and successful on heavy tracks (23: 4-5-7). Won a Bm82 on heavy at Wagga two starts back.

selections.name: Future Fund
selections.reason: Won a Bm82 on heavy ground at Wagga last start. Shaun Guymer rides and is a major player.

selections.name: Astunner
selections.reason: Good third at Canterbury last start. Possesses strong wet-track stats and Brodie Loy takes the ride.

danger_horse.name: Mathrin
danger_horse.reason: A heavy track specialist who loves racing at Wagga and is always a threat in these conditions.

selections.name: Heart Balm
selections.reason: Chasing a hat-trick after winning both starts this preparation on heavy tracks at Wagga. In superb form.

selections.name: My Mate Elvis
selections.reason: Won his maiden on heavy ground last start at Wagga. Jeff Penza rides and looks a major danger.

selections.name: Sunroe
selections.reason: Won a Bm50 on heavy ground at Gundagai two starts back. Molly Bourke rides and can feature.

selections.name: Midnight Affair
selections.reason: Good second behind Heart Balm last start on heavy ground. Coriah Keatings rides and can build on that.

danger_horse.name: My Mate Elvis
danger_horse.reason: Impressive maiden winner last start who handles the heavy conditions with ease.

selections.name: Brutal Force
selections.reason: Chasing a hat-trick after winning both starts this preparation on heavy tracks. Robyn Freeman rides.

selections.name: Brial Rose
selections.reason: Won a Bm58 on heavy ground at Albury two starts back. Ella Bent rides and is a major threat.

selections.name: Postwar
selections.reason: Impressive five-length maiden winner on heavy ground last start. Brodie Loy rides from the inside draw.

selections.name: Iroquai
selections.reason: Won her maiden on heavy ground two starts back. Shaun Guymer rides and can feature.

danger_horse.name: Brial Rose
danger_horse.reason: Proven heavy track performer who will appreciate the sprint distance and the claim.
